mission.title: opentelemetry-collector: [mdatagen] Consider linking metrics/attributes from metadata.yaml to SemConv definitions
mission.description: [mdatagen] Consider linking metrics/attributes from metadata.yaml to SemConv definitions. Requested by 9+ users.

steps.title: Check current opentelemetry-collector deployment
steps.description:
Verify your opentelemetry-collector version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-collector
helm list -n opentelemetry-collector 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working opentelemetry-collector installation.

steps.title: Review opentelemetry-collector configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant opentelemetry-collector configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-collector
kubectl get configmap -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentelemetry-collector
```
`mdatagen` allows today to set [sem_conv_version](https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector/blob/4ca0f1829e0a348738caab8799237d395a975888/cmd/mdatagen/metadata-schema.yaml#L42) within the `metdata.yaml` file.

steps.title: Apply the fix for [mdatagen] Consider linking metrics/attributes from…
steps.description:
It seems that OpenTelemetry-Go already generates code based on SemConv (using Weaver).

It looks like there is some overlap between mdatagen and OpenTelemetry-Go.

For example https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-go/blob/main/semconv/v1.34.0/cpuconv/metric.go#L240-L259 looks quite close to what mdatagen generates at

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-collector
kubectl get events -n opentelemetry-collector --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[mdatagen] Consider linking metrics/attributes from…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
It seems that OpenTelemetry-Go already generates code based on SemConv (using Weaver).

It looks like there is some overlap between mdatagen and OpenTelemetry-Go.

For example https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-go/blob/main/semconv/v1.34.0/cpuconv/metric.go#L240-L259 looks quite close to what mdatagen generates at

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with opentelemetry-collector installed or the issue environment reproducible.
